log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Iron Concentration.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kender — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 42/67
--- Kender — Iron Concentration --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Iron Concentration.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kender — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 31 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 11/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kender — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Iron Concentration.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 7 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 4/67
